title: Terrible Costumes
description: A collection of terrible costume ideas for Knarfy's Halloween video
body:
# Knarfy's Terrible Costumes
**This mod adds ridiculous costume ideas into Minecraft so you can host costume parties with your friends! Nothing could possibly go wrong... right?**

Inspired by YouTube comments and developed for a video on Knarfy's channel!

Check out the original video here for more info on the mod: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FJhSCMts6-w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### The terrible costumes included in this mod are as follows:

- **Template Man**
- **Sheep** _(Gets attacked by Wolves)_
- **Knarfy**
- **Skeleton** _(Gets attacked by Wolves)_
- **Arctic Fundy** _(Very cold)_
- **Fundy**
- **Cut Copper** _(Works like Copper)_
- **Warden** _(Friends with Wardens)_
- **SystemZee**
- **Steve**
- **Master Chief** _(Includes Energy Sword)_
- **Sniffer**
- **Fish** _(Ultra Fast Swimmer)_
- **TNT** _(Don't crouch)_
- **Brick** _(Breaks glass)_
- **Silverfish** _(Can get smol)_

Use the `/costume` command to get yourself the correct costume and items related to it!

Also, use the gamerule `costumeIntroFunctionality` to give your players some introductory messages on-screen! Use `/setjoinlocation` to give them the correct place to spawn for your party when they run the `/joinparty` command!
